description_long: This is a cubic, dark blue-gray trash bin with a flat, removable lid featuring a small, centered handle on top. The body of the bin is vertically ribbed, giving it a reinforced, sturdy appearance. On two opposing sides, there is a pixelated recycling symbol in muted green and gray tones, indicating its use for recyclable waste. The other two sides are plain, with no visible markings or decorations. The bin appears to be made primarily of plastic, with a matte finish and subtle color variations to simulate wear or texture. Its size and design suggest it is suitable for placement on sidewalks, in parks, or near public buildings for pedestrian use.
description: A dark blue-gray, cubic trash bin with a flat lid and recycling symbols on two sides, made of sturdy plastic with a matte finish.
description_view_0: Front view showing the recycling symbol and the flat lid with a small handle.
description_view_1: Side view with plain ribbed surface and no visible markings.
description_view_2: Rear view identical to the front, displaying the recycling symbol and lid handle.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, plain and ribbed like view 1, without markings.
